title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in from the authentication page and land on the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Choose to sign in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Offline-first changes persist after refresh
description: Verifies that while offline mode is enabled, newly logged activities persist after a page refresh and remain visible in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the authentication form
Click the link to open settings
Toggle offline mode on
Click the link to open the mood page
Create a new mood entry with a valid selection and a short note
Press F5 to refresh the page
Verify the newly created mood entry is still present on the mood page

title: Complete a habit from Habits and see streak and score impact
description: Verifies marking a habit complete increments its streak and the dashboard reflects an updated daily score.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Choose to sign in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to open the Habits page
Mark a habit as complete
Click the navigation to return to the Dashboard
Verify today's score reflects the completion change
Verify the completed habit shows an incremented streak

title: Dashboard shows today's score, rank, and charts
description: Verifies the dashboard renders the daily score and rank along with radar and weekly charts for review.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Choose to sign in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify today's score and a rank badge are displayed
Verify radar and weekly performance charts are displayed

title: Toggle offline mode and see sync indicator reflect offline state
description: Verifies a user can enable offline mode in settings and the app reflects the offline state via the sync status indicator.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the authentication form
Click the link to open settings
Toggle offline mode on
Verify the sync status indicator shows the app is offline

title: Habit completion persists after refresh
description: Verifies a completed habit remains completed after a page refresh, indicating local persistence in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to open the Habits page
Mark a habit as complete
Press F5 to refresh the page
Verify the same habit still appears completed

title: Dashboard shows today's permanent tasks list
description: Verifies the dashboard surfaces today's permanent tasks and their completion states for the daily loop.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Choose to sign in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Scroll to today's permanent tasks section
Verify a list of permanent tasks is displayed

title: Start and stop a study timer and see the logged duration added to progress
description: Verifies a user can run a study timer for a subject, stop it, and see the logged duration reflected in subject progress and today’s score contribution UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open Study
Start a study timer for a subject
Wait for a short duration
Stop the study timer
Verify a new logged study duration is added to the subject’s progress
Verify today’s score contribution reflects study activity

title: Switch from offline mode back to online without losing locally created data
description: Verifies data created while offline remains visible after turning offline mode off and navigating across pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the authentication form
Click the link to open settings
Toggle offline mode on
Click the link to open the nutrition page
Log a new meal with a valid name and macros
Click the link to open settings
Toggle offline mode off
Click the link to open the calendar page
Verify the day’s activity is reflected in the calendar view

title: Log a meal with macros updates daily nutrition progress
description: Verifies a user can add a meal with macros and the nutrition progress visualization updates to reflect the new totals.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for Nutrition
Start adding a new meal entry
Fill Meal QA 1 into the meal name field
Fill valid macro values into the macros fields
Save the meal entry
Verify the macro progress visualization reflects the newly added meal

title: Log a workout and see it reflected in workout insights and today’s score

Fill "Push Ups" into the exercise name field

Save the workout log

Verify today’s score contribution reflects workout activity
